title: Fix http-server.ts shutdown, port/host parsing, and FastMCP middleware type error
description: src/http-server.ts has multiple issues: (1) shutdown is `process.exit(0)` — no await server.stop(), no flush (L19/H19). (2) Port parsing: `(process.env.PORT ?? '7123') ? parseInt(...) : 7123` is meaningless ternary. Host has no fallback. (3) Line 225: `middleware` not a valid FastMCP option (LSP error). Fix all three.
validation: Read http-server.ts. Confirm shutdown is async, port/host are simple, no `middleware` option. Run typecheck.
